title: Phanera burbidgei
taxonomy: Phanera burbidgei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. This family comprises approximately 830 species of flowering plants. The genus Phanera is a group of plants that are primarily found in tropical Asia. The classification of Phanera burbidgei is further detailed as a member of the tribe Polygaleae. This plant is native to Myanmar.
